summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DressApp language selector functionality. All 12 supported languages work correctly with proper persistence, AI localization, and enum field preservation.
passed_tests: Language Persistence - All 12 language codes (en, he, ar, es, fr, de, it, pt, ru, zh, ja, hi) persist correctly via PATCH /users/me
Language Validation - All 12 language codes accepted without 400/422 errors
Stylist Hebrew Localization - Hebrew characters detected in reasoning_summary, spoken_reply, and do_dont fields
Stylist Spanish Localization - Spanish language detected in AI output with proper localization
Garment Vision Hebrew Localization - Hebrew characters in title/caption/repair_advice, enum fields remain English
Existing Endpoints Regression - All pre-existing endpoints (GET /closet, POST /closet/search, GET /listings, POST /auth/dev-bypass) working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: Skipped per request
